notes: Term 'epic' chosen over 'initiative'. Nested layout specs/<epic>/<feature> decided. v1: prompted handoff, serial execution, JIT charters, warn+confirm dep gate. Open questions in PRD section 7. TECH DECISIONS: Python manifest helper (scripts/epic-manifest.py) is deterministic core (acyclicity, validate, resolve, atomic writes, render-status). Manifest is single source of truth for charters + exposes/consumes; EPIC.md generated narrative mirrors it; no cached per-feature status (derived live). Centralized name->dir resolution via shared-conventions block. Completion = forge-5-loop done AND (impl-verify absent OR passed/applied); handoff offers impl-verify (recommended, skippable). Full edit-scope across all stages.
